subject: Metapod — green angular cocoon creature suspended from a branch, in a waiting-to-evolve pose
description: A rigid green chrysalis creature hangs from a diagonal branch in the upper portion of the frame. Its body is angular and segmented, with a smooth hardened exterior and a faint face visible on its surface. The background is spare and light — a simple pale setting suggesting open air or a thinly lit outdoor space. The composition is minimal: the cocoon is the sole subject, suspended in stillness. The palette is almost entirely green-on-pale.
foreground: green angular cocoon hanging from a branch
